transcription_errors.note: Takei initially says what is transcribed as 'Elaine Collins' but within seconds refers to the same person as 'Wayne Collins' — the well-known civil liberties attorney (Wikidata Q7975234). The 'Elaine' form is either a speech artifact or transcription error.
Phonetic transcription variant of 'Tule Lake' (Tule Lake War Relocation Center).
Transcription error for 'Tule Lake' — interviewer says 'Willie Lake' but context makes clear this is Tule Lake.
Transcription garble of the Star Trek acronym IDIC (Infinite Diversity in Infinite Combinations).
